message:
docs: update QA evidence matrix, canonical examples, and beads issue tracker

artifacts/wasm_qa_evidence_matrix_v1.json:
- Add evidence entries for packaged bootstrap and cancellation
  harness scenarios, linking to the new contract tests and e2e
  runners.

docs/wasm_canonical_examples.md:
- Add canonical usage examples for the Next.js bootstrap adapter
  and React adapter, reflecting the expanded SDK surface.

docs/wasm_qa_evidence_matrix_contract.md:
- Extend the QA evidence matrix contract specification to cover
  the packaged bootstrap and cancellation test categories.

.beads/issues.jsonl:
- Update issue statuses to reflect completed work (notify fix,
  pool fairness, rwlock starvation, bootstrap adapter, framework
  consumer validators). Close resolved issues with close reasons.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -182,9 +182,21 @@
       "scenario_id": "WASM-QA-SMOKE-NATIVE-BACKSTOP",
       "description": "Run the ignored native all-targets backstop after wasm cfg-gating changes",
       "command": "rch exec -- env CARGO_INCREMENTAL=0 CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/rch-codex-wasm-cfg cargo test --test wasm_cfg_compile_invariants native_all_targets_backstop_holds -- --ignored --nocapture"
+    },
+    {
+      "scenario_id": "WASM-QA-SMOKE-PACKAGED-BOOTSTRAP",
+      "description": "Run packaged bootstrap/load/reload harness in dry-run mode and verify schema-style WASM E2E bundle emission",
+      "command": "rch exec -- env HARNESS_PROFILE=packaged_bootstrap HARNESS_DRY_RUN=1 RCH_BIN=/bin/true FAULT_MATRIX_MODE=reduced bash scripts/test_wasm_cross_framework_e2e.sh"
+    },
+    {
+      "scenario_id": "WASM-QA-SMOKE-HOST-BRIDGE",
+      "description": "Run host-bridge fetch/streams/websocket/storage harness in dry-run mode and verify schema-style WASM E2E bundle emission",
+      "command": "rch exec -- env HARNESS_PROFILE=host_bridge HARNESS_DRY_RUN=1 RCH_BIN=/bin/true FAULT_MATRIX_MODE=reduced bash scripts/test_wasm_cross_framework_e2e.sh"
     }
   ],
   "downstream_beads": [
+    "asupersync-3qv04.8.4.1",
+    "asupersync-3qv04.8.4.3",
     "asupersync-3qv04.8.4.4",
     "asupersync-3qv04.6"
   ]

@@ -48,6 +49,25 @@ At minimum, example execution logs must include:
 
 Framework-specific logs may add extra fields, but these fields are mandatory.
 
+## Maintained Vanilla Browser Example
+
+Maintained vanilla Browser Edition example source:
+
+- `tests/fixtures/vite-vanilla-consumer`
+- validation harness: `scripts/validate_vite_vanilla_consumer.sh`
+
+This fixture is the canonical low-friction browser-only entrypoint for:
+
+- `@asupersync/browser` package import resolution
+- packaged WASM artifact loading through a real Vite consumer build
+- deterministic artifact output under `target/e2e-results/vite_vanilla_consumer/`
+
+Primary deterministic validation command:
+
+```bash
+PATH=/usr/bin:$PATH bash scripts/validate_vite_vanilla_consumer.sh
+```
+
 ## Canonical Repro Commands
 
 Run all example lanes (preferred CI/replay bundle):

+Packaged bootstrap/load/reload baseline harness (bead `asupersync-3qv04.8.4.1`) is tracked as smoke scenario `WASM-QA-SMOKE-PACKAGED-BOOTSTRAP`, which invokes:
+
+```bash

+```
+
+Host-bridge fetch/streams/websocket/storage baseline harness (bead `asupersync-3qv04.8.4.3`) is tracked as smoke scenario `WASM-QA-SMOKE-HOST-BRIDGE`, which invokes:
+

+rch exec -- env HARNESS_PROFILE=host_bridge HARNESS_DRY_RUN=1 RCH_BIN=/bin/true FAULT_MATRIX_MODE=reduced bash scripts/test_wasm_cross_framework_e2e.sh
+```
